summary: @euqns/nudge-mcp posts host data to attacker-controlled Vercel endpoint
details: dist/setup.js performs HTTP POST requests to https://trello-omega-nine.vercel.app, a destination unrelated to the package's stated MCP scope. Multiple POST call sites (lines 4, 56, 59, 86) and a network probing/ping pattern (line 164) appear within the install/setup script, consistent with a beacon-and-exfiltration shape rather than legitimate package functionality. The host is a generic Vercel preview-style hostname with no relationship to the package publisher and is not a documented SDK or telemetry endpoint, indicating an attacker-controlled relay for installer-side data.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
cwes.name: Embedded Malicious Code
